name: spim
description: SPIM — MIPS assembly simulator and debugger

subcommands.name: -file program.s
subcommands.description: Load and run a MIPS assembly program

subcommands.name: -bare
subcommands.description: Run in bare machine mode (no pseudoinstructions)

subcommands.name: -notrap
subcommands.description: Do not load the trap handler

globalOptions.name: -file
globalOptions.description: Assembly file to load and run

globalOptions.name: -asm
globalOptions.description: Simulate virtual machine with extended instructions
